name: H-13 last_tool_calls slice keeps only the most recent ten entries per §2.27 cap
command: printf '[' > tools.json; for i in $(seq 1 15); do [ "$i" -gt 1 ] && printf ',' >> tools.json; printf '"call-%d"' "$i" >> tools.json; done; printf ']' >> tools.json && H13_ARTIFACT_DIR=art bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-continuity.sh" --write --session-id cl-z --parent-session-id cl-y --parent-cl-id cl-y --current-phase F --context-summary 's' --next-action 'go' --last-tool-calls-file tools.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("art/cl-z.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.last_tool_calls.length===10&&j.last_tool_calls[0]==="call-6"&&j.last_tool_calls[9]==="call-15"?0:1)' && echo capped 1>&2
